title: yarn
html:
yarn

Shell

yarn exec /bin/sh
echo '{"scripts": {"preinstall": "/bin/sh"}}' >package.json
yarn --cwd .
echo '{"scripts": {"xxx": "/bin/sh"}}' >package.json
yarn --cwd . xxx
